body:
## Summary
Implement custom pure-function state machine for RoundState flow, replacing the existing XState PvE machine.

## Architecture
```
transition(state, event) → { ctx, ok, error? }
```
- **guards.ts**: 10 guard conditions — SKILL/SHUFFLE share player-action phase (freely alternatable)
- **actions.ts**: GameContext + 15 side-effect actions (draw, boss telegraph, skills, shuffle, play, resolve, boss attack, round end)
- **roundMachine.ts**: main transition function — switch/case over all event types

## State flow
```
DRAW → BOSS_TELEGRAPH → SKILL/SHUFFLE → PLAY → RESOLVE
  ├─ Boss HP ≤ 0 → WIN
  └─ Boss HP > 0 → BOSS_ATTACK
       ├─ Player HP ≤ 0 → LOSE
       └─ Player HP > 0 → ROUND_END → back to DRAW
```

## Design decisions
- No dependency on XState — zero-lib pure functions
- Event format compatible with XState (`{ type, ... }`) for future migration
- All state modifications are immutable (spread copies)
- Old `logic/pve/` code preserved untouched (`.js` files)

## Test plan
- [x] `tsc --noEmit` — zero type errors
- [x] 25 new state machine tests (159 total across all unit tests)
  - Full round flow end-to-end
  - Boss telegraph: roll intent, charge forced release, defend
  - Skills: apply, reject outside phase, reject second use
  - Shuffle: select/confirm/cancel, reject when exhausted
  - Shield: block/shatter/void on boss death
  - Boss death → WIN, player death → LOSE
  - Round end reset
  - Invalid events rejected with error message
title: feat(pve): custom state machine replacing XState
